_note: Session scorecard: 6-commit wave closing harness gaps, RCA documentation, live DNS zone repair (ns2.tag.ooo NS added, duplicate api.interface A removed). SPIKE is honest — 3 production outages Owned (EventOps gRPC 502, SPOF NS same-IP, OroCommerce KVM down). Caddy not yet the :443 terminator. These are real blockers, not miscalculation.
